- [x] JumpCode-like strings found inside exported Android bundle

## 7. APK Truth Boundary

To prove JumpCode is inside the APK:
1. Build APK with EAS.
2. Download APK.
3. Unzip APK.
4. Search assets/index.android.bundle or Hermes .hbc for JumpCode markers.
5. Install APK.
6. Open route/test screen that calls JumpCode.
7. Capture logcat or UI proof.

## Status
JUMPCODE_STATUS=LIKELY_INCLUDED_IN_ANDROID_JS_BUNDLE
